title: Damaalu Dumeelu Song Lyrics From Bogan
stanzas:
#DammaaluDummeelu Song Lyrics From #Bogan
Singer - #AnirudhRavichander , Lyrics : #Rokesh

this song is a tribute
to all the hero's
and villain's

madhangonga yaanai
enna seiyyum theriyumaa..
madhamgonda singathidam
thotru odum odum .

manadhaal mahadevi
illaye marana devi

Dammaalu dammaalu
dummeelu dummeelu
hey
dummeelu dummeelu
Dammaalu dammaalu (2)

oruvaati mudivu pannitana
empecha naane ketkamaaten

rangu panna rattu thaane
ella kottukulla
soaku scene toppu thaane
naanum orrukulla

Thappu panna
vaaya odachi
thattuven da palla...
En manasu kulla
villainuku
eevu erakam illa

Dammaalu dammaalu
dummeelu dummeelu
hey
dummeelu dummeelu
Dammaalu dammaalu (2)

pulla poochigalukkellam
idea varudhu
senjiduven

arasal kotsal yetsal
koduthaa yaara irundhalaum
avana
ultimate aalu thaana
seendi paaru ivana

gaanda geenda
aakki vitta
thevailama sivanaa.
Ya roobathula
pathuduva
nerula ne yemana.

Dammaalu dammaalu
dummeelu dummeelu
hey
dummeelu dummeelu
Dammaalu dammaalu (2)

therikkavidalamaa
daai. en vazhkaila
ovvoru naalum
ovvoru nimizhamum
yen, ovvoru nodiyum
naana sedhukkunadhu da

ashok, nee irudhuvaraikkum
indha rajiniya
nanbanaa thaan pathirukka
inime indha rajiniya
virodhiyaa paakka poraa
unnudaya dairy-la
kurichu vachiko

jaikanumne porandhavan
naanthaane
enakinge kavala illa

edhirthu nikkum
edhiringa ellaarum
povaanga mannukulla
haai chellam.

Safety ilatha
Thangai ku ellam
epavum na dhan
da Annan..

Moonji ah muzhusa
mathiduven yedagudam
yedhuna panna..

edhukkum thuninja aalu
kelu kelu kelu
oothiduven naanum paalu

Dammaalu dammaalu
dummeelu dummeelu
hey
dummeelu dummeelu
Dammaalu dammaalu (2)

vachirukken vachirukken
nenjukulla dhilla.
yaarumilla yaarumilla
ennai ingu vella

aanavatha gaali pannum
ayyanaaru pulla
indha areaavula enna vittaa
ella saamy illa.

I am a hero , I am a villain
sivajiyum naanthaan
MGRum naanthaan
idhu eppudi irukku

Dammaalu dammaalu
dummeelu dummeelu
hey
dummeelu dummeelu
Dammaalu dammaalu (2)

Meesa pillakaa..
Sharp paiyan sallakaa..
Fraud pannakaa..
Thookkiduven allekaa.
I am waiting..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Damaalu Dumeelu?

The song is a tribute to both heroes and villains, capturing the essence of their roles in cinema.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie Bogan?

In Bogan, the song reflects the playful and energetic moments that highlight the characters' dynamics.

Who is the singer and music director of Damaalu Dumeelu?

The song is sung by Anirudh and composed by D Imman.

When was Damaalu Dumeelu released?

The song was released on November 29, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Damaalu Dumeelu is an energetic dance number that encapsulates the playful spirit of the film Bogan. The song serves as a tribute to the duality of heroes and villains, showcasing their vibrant personalities. With its catchy beats and lively lyrics, it evokes a sense of celebration and joy. The lively performance by Anirudh adds to the song's infectious energy, making it a perfect fit for parties and celebrations.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Damaalu Dumeelu from Bogan is a vibrant anthem that celebrates the essence of heroes and villains alike. With Anirudh's electrifying vocals and D Imman's catchy beats, this song is sure to get you on your feet. Experience the fusion of fun and energy that makes this track a must-listen!
stanzaMeanings: This song is a tribute to all the heroes and villains.
Do you know what the elephant will do? The elephant will run away after breaking the fence.
Is there no goddess in my heart, only the goddess of death?
Dammaalu dammaalu dummeelu dummeelu hey dummeelu dummeelu Dammaalu dammaalu (2)
I won't listen to anyone who has made a decision about me.
The one who colors is the one who is in the scene, I too am in that place.
I will hit the mouth that does wrong... In my heart, there is no place for the villain.
Dammaalu dammaalu dummeelu dummeelu hey dummeelu dummeelu Dammaalu dammaalu (2)
I will come up with ideas for all the little flowers.
No matter who gives the ultimate answer, just look at him, he is the ultimate person.
The one who has made a mess is the one who is in trouble. What will happen to you in this situation?
Dammaalu dammaalu dummeelu dummeelu hey dummeelu dummeelu Dammaalu dammaalu (2)
Can you not understand? In my life, every day and every moment, I am taking it all in.
Ashok, until you are here, I am a friend of this Rajini. From now on, I will see this Rajini as an enemy, keep that in your diary.
I am the one who was born to win, so I have no worries.
Everyone will go to the place where they are supposed to go.
Hi dear.
Without safety, I am always the brother for my sister.
I will completely change my face, whatever happens, I will do it.
I will shout for everyone who is in trouble, I will also help them.
Dammaalu dammaalu dummeelu dummeelu hey dummeelu dummeelu Dammaalu dammaalu (2)
I am here, I am here, there is no one in my heart. No one is here to help me.
In this area, the one who causes trouble is the one who is not a good person.
I am a hero, I am a villain, I am Sivaji and I am MGR, how is this?
Dammaalu dammaalu dummeelu dummeelu hey dummeelu dummeelu Dammaalu dammaalu (2)
With a mustache, I am a sharp guy... I won't commit fraud... I will take it away, right?
I am waiting..
